synopsis: The framing story reaches its climax as Lina Graf and Skritt flee through a hall of armor in Fortress Vader, only for the displays to lurch to life and surround them. The dark figure of Vaneé emerges, branding the thief Hudd an intruder, and recounts a raid on the castle soon after it was built, when Mustafarian warriors seized him and he begged for mercy from Darth Vader himself. As Vaneé's tale ends, Vader confronts the survivors directly, holding up what remains of the droid Crater and deflecting Lina's blaster fire with ease. Drawing on the lessons of each frightening story he has heard, Skritt commandeers an AT-ST and attacks the castle as a distraction. Vader hurls the walker into a lava lake, but Skritt escapes, and Lina pilots a TIE fighter that carries the survivors up and away from Mustafar. As they flee, Lina wonders whether their escape was Vader's design all along, meant to spread fear of the castle and its master across the galaxy.
title: Tales from Vader's Castle #5
